mapper.select: SELECT ep.id, ep.oasis_id AS oasisId, ep.period, ep.shares, ep.price, ep.earning_yield AS earningYield, ep.status, ep.create_at AS createAt, eps.credit, eps.sold, eps.write_off AS writeOff, eps.redemption FROM oasis_equity_period ep INNER JOIN oasis_equity_period_summary eps ON ep.id = eps.equity_period_id WHERE ep.oasis_id = #{dto.oasisId} ORDER BY ep.period DESC
